title: mode_routing_result
description: Output of ModeRouter. Records which mode was selected and why.

selected_mode.description: The mode activated for this run.

target_style_source.description: Present when selected_mode is 'target_llm_style'. How the target style was determined.

routing_reason.description: Explanation of why this mode was selected.

x-hard_rules: exactly one mode must be selected per run — ModeRouter cannot activate two modes
target_style_source is required when selected_mode is 'target_llm_style'
routing_reason must reference the specific signal or user input that triggered the selection
